tracks.rawText: 3:19Title: “Pretty Lies”v5This neo-psychedelia reggae fusion starts with swirling phased guitars and dub-style rhythms, underpinned by soft trap hi-hats and a deep sub bass, Lush female vocals float over opulent, cascading synths and tasteful drums, creating a sensual, introspective sonic landscape throughout2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Title: “Pretty Lies”

tracks.rawText: 2:55Title: “Pretty Lies”v5neo-psychedelia reggae fusion with soft trap influence, lush female vocals dripping confidence and cosmic glamour, shimmering synths, deep bass, elegant rhythm, “Quantum Luxurious” — luxury as a state of mind, dripping gold and starlight, sensual and introspective vibe3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Title: “Pretty Lies”

tracks.rawText: 3:44Title: “Pretty Lies”v5A reggae-tech dub fusion kicks off with a heavy, syncopated bassline, crisp drums, and spaced-out echo-laden synths, The verses pulse with deep reggae grooves, subtle dub effects, and minimalistic guitar chops, The chorus bursts with rich layers, electronic drops, and a girl’s powerful, commanding vocal soaring over the rhythm, Dub-style breakdowns and filtered instrumental bridges keep the sound dynamic and immersive41PublishRemix
tracks.title: Title: “Pretty Lies”
